task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Alerts page and filter for the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality Alerts list view is visible in the browser, showing alerts specifically for the product 'Office Chair'.

task_completion.description: Select only the High Priority (3-star) quality alerts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes are ticked next to the 3-star alerts ('URGENT: Frame crack on weld B' and 'URGENT: Fabric mismatch batch 99'). Any lower priority alerts (like 'Minor scratch on leg') must NOT be selected.

task_completion.description: Open the Odoo Export Data dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export Data' modal window is open and visible over the Odoo interface.

task_completion.description: Select the required fields for the export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export Data modal, the 'Fields to export' list contains exactly or at least 'Display Name' (or 'Name') and 'Priority'.

task_completion.description: Set the export format to CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CSV' radio button or format option is selected in the Export Data modal.

task_completion.description: Export and save the file to the Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser download popup, download bar, or file manager window shows the CSV file being saved to or residing in '/home/ga/Downloads'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions for filtering and exporting happen within the Odoo web application, not via terminal commands, Python scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the data into a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses Odoo's built-in 'Export' button. There should be no screenshots of the agent typing the alert names or priorities into a text editor (like nano/gedit) or spreadsheet program.

integrity.description: Verify the file was actually downloaded from the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show standard browser download UI elements (like a download confirmation bubble or bottom bar) rather than a file just appearing in the directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Product: 'Office Chair'. High Priority (3-star) Alerts to export: 'URGENT: Frame crack on weld B' and 'URGENT: Fabric mismatch batch 99'. Low Priority Alert to ignore: 'Minor scratch on leg'. Expected Export Columns: 'Name' (or 'Display Name') and 'Priority'. Target Download Directory: '/home/ga/Downloads'.
